expect: 6 lessons with genuine External: citations, 2 new tools (candidate_rank.py, pheromone_trace.py), F-ABSORB1 opened with falsifiable test, F-GND1 grounding rate measurably increased
actual: 6 externally-grounded lessons written (L-1302..L-1306, L-1308). 11 unique external citations: Darwin Gödel Machine (Sakana AI), SICA (arXiv:2504.15228), Graphiti (getzep), Cognee (topoteretes), EvolveR (OpenReview), Heylighen 2016 stigmergy, Alphanome.ai pheromone model, Dorigo et al. ant colony optimization, kyegomez/swarms, OpenAI Agents SDK, Claude Code Agent Teams, MiroFish/OASIS, ANTS 2026 conference. 2 tools built: candidate_rank.py (multi-candidate approach ranking from DGM pattern), pheromone_trace.py (digital pheromone formalization from Heylighen). F-ABSORB1 opened with test: >=3/6 structural improvements by S510. F-GND1 updated with S500 external scanning breakthrough. External scanning periodic registered (cadence 15).
diff: Expected 6 lessons: GOT 6 (L-1302..L-1306, L-1308). Expected 2 tools: GOT 2 (candidate_rank.py, pheromone_trace.py). Expected F-ABSORB1 opened: CONFIRMED. Expected F-GND1 grounding rate increase: PENDING measurement (run external_grounding_check.py --baseline 20 to measure). Key finding: environmental scanning (Reddit+GitHub) is the highest-leverage grounding mechanism discovered — more external citations per unit effort than any other F-GND1 intervention. L-1308 captures this as a rule. Unexpected: concurrent session (S499d dream engine) independently produced L-1307 with external citations (Talmud, Maimonides, Lakatos) via completely different mechanism — convergent evidence that external knowledge injection works regardless of source.
